---
title: "Staging Blocked Evaluation over Structured Sparse Matrices"
date: 2026-02-16"
year: 2026
pdf: ""
venue: "Arxiv 2026"
code: ""
slides: ""
preprint: "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.00829"
video: ""
author:
  - name: Pratyush Das
  - name: Amirhossein Basareh
  - name: Adhitha Dias
  - name: Artem Pelenitsyn
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
  - name: Ben Delaware
categories:
  - Manuscript
description: ""
---
